checks.finding: No issues found. T-001, T-004, and T-005 declare medium with limited impact, controlled reversibility, and behavioral surfaces; T-002 and T-003 declare high with material impact, difficult reversibility, sensitive surfaces, and tdd workflows, matching risk-classification-policy.md.

No issues found. T-002 and T-003 Done When each require explicit red.log and green.log evidence with failing tests committed before implementation, plus a named independent reviewer recording PASS in the task implementation report.

tasks.md decomposes several tasks beyond one focused implementation session. T-001 Scope combines at least five implementation areas: capability matrix, paired selectors, risk/recurrence policy, terminal-resume state handling, and role floors. T-002 combines the schema, paired snapshot builders, paired validators, batch orchestration, identity/fallback handling, and fixtures. T-005 combines broad release-surface synchronization, a hash inventory contract, paired transactional rollback executables, and isolated success/failure fixtures. These scopes exceed the prompt's more-than-three-area sizing indicator; implementation and verification can become partially complete while the task remains indivisible, which is a blocking Major decomposition defect.

T-004 is a functional reporting/retrospective task mapped only to AC-005 and TEST-004, but acceptance-tests.md TEST-004 checks presence of required template fields and contains no edge-case or error-path scenario. Although T-004 Done When mentions legacy fixtures, that case is absent from the corresponding acceptance criterion. A regression in backward-compatible report handling could therefore satisfy the named acceptance test, so this is a blocking Major coverage gap.

SKIP: tasks.md contains no dedicated test task declaring unit, integration, end-to-end, or acceptance as its task type; test files and TEST-NNN checks are embedded within functional implementation tasks.

No issues found. High-risk T-002 and T-003 each contain an explicit Rollback field and a Done When item requiring an isolated rollback fixture that restores the affected baseline and reruns the relevant tests.

No issues found. T-001 through T-005 identify distinct primary purposes and test targets; where later release or reporting work consumes earlier artifacts, explicit Blockers ordering prevents simultaneous modification for the same purpose.

No issues found. T-002 depends on T-001 model-selection fields, T-003 builds reviewer/evaluator isolation after the T-002 manifest boundary, T-004 reports identities and gate metrics supplied by T-002/T-003, and T-005 waits for all feature artifacts so its synchronized hashes and rollback inventory can be finalized.
SKIP: no bugfix or debugging task in scope.
